item.name: Magicked Parasol
item.description: Enchanted to fly, this posh pink parasol will put the whole world at your feet.

mount.name: Magicked Parasol
mount.action: Summon forth your magicked parasol, and have the whole world at your feet.
mount.description: This flying parasol was created by a certain elderly mage in her youth. Intending to sell them en masse to fund her research, she chose a pink parasol─popular in those days─as the base. Due to the need for considerable magical power and grip strength to use them, however, she experienced only modest success.
mount.tooltip:
Perhaps you'll need a parasol
the next time you visit!
- Sparkling-eyed Loporrit
